programs.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programs.desc: A compilation of the best episodes of 'OMG! Yeh Mera India', wherein the host sheds light on several inspiring and exciting stories from across India.

programs.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programs.desc: Competitors test the mettle of a hybrid Yatagan sabre, a two-handed Bowie knife and other bladed weapons. Later, a female bladesmith comes close to a first-time achievement.

programs.title: Born to be Wild
programs.desc: Survivalist Andrew Ucles travels to Africa in order to fulfil his mission of finding twelve fierce animals within seven days.

programs.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programs.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programs.title: Tour D' Royale
programs.desc: The filmmaker takes a deep dive into the rich culture and heritage of Rajasthan and Gujarat by visiting luxurious palaces and mansions.

programs.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programs.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on lesser-known unbelievable stories about fantastic animals, like a warrior bear that helped the Allies win WWII, and real-life hobbit-like humans in Indonesia.

actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan
